red.summary: Inspected existing ConversationPairCard tests (lines 247-304). All long-content fixtures (.repeat(10), .repeat(20), .repeat(50)) already exceed the new 100-char threshold, so existing tests act as the safety net (still expect expand button to appear, assert isExpanded full content shows). No new RED test was needed; baseline run confirmed 24 passing tests before change.

green.summary: Changed COLLAPSED_MAX_CHARS 300 -> 100 and COLLAPSED_MAX_LINES 5 -> 2 in src/components/worktree/ConversationPairCard.tsx, with JSDoc explaining the rationale and Issue ref.

refactor.summary: Added JSDoc on both constants instead of a single-line comment; no behavioral changes.

phases.commit: 46c5f510 feat(history): collapse assistant messages to 2 lines / 100 chars (#725) [案A]

phases.phase: Phase 2 - 案B (Assistant style weakening + User defensive set)

red.summary: Updated tests/integration/conversation-pair-card.test.tsx selectors (lines 70 and 111) from '.text-sm.text-gray-200' to '.text-xs.text-gray-300' for the assistant container; user-side selector at line 187 intentionally unchanged. Confirmed 2/5 tests FAIL.

green.summary: Updated ConversationPairCard.tsx: AssistantMessagesSection wrapper className from 'bg-gray-800/50 border-l-4 border-gray-600 p-3 border-t border-gray-700 space-y-3' to 'bg-gray-900/30 border-l-4 border-gray-700 p-2 border-t border-gray-700 space-y-2'; AssistantMessageItem body from 'text-sm text-gray-200 ...' to 'text-xs text-gray-300 ...'; UserMessageSection body gained '[word-break:break-word] max-w-full overflow-x-hidden' (defensive parity with Assistant).

refactor.summary: No additional refactoring; the className updates are minimal and self-documenting.

phases.commit: c6a81639 feat(history): de-emphasize assistant style + harden user container (#725) [案B]

red.summary: Implementation-first because the C feature spans 5 files (config + 2 components + 2 layout files). After plumbing C-1..C-11, added 7 new tests in src/components/worktree/__tests__/HistoryPane.integration.test.tsx ('Issue #725: User only filter' describe block). Running the new tests before plumbing would have produced compile-time errors on missing props rather than meaningful RED, so implementation-first was selected per the work-plan note for C-12.
tests_added: should hide assistant message section when historyUserOnly is true
should still show assistant section when historyUserOnly is false
should skip orphan pairs (no userMessage) when historyUserOnly is true
toggle button should reflect aria-pressed based on historyUserOnly
should call onHistoryUserOnlyChange with negated value when toggle is clicked
should not render assistant section even when search query matches only assistant content (userOnly takes priority)
should not render toggle button when onHistoryUserOnlyChange is not provided

green.summary: C-1: Added HISTORY_USER_ONLY_STORAGE_KEY constant to src/config/history-display-config.ts with JSDoc describing 'true'/'false' contract and safe-off fallback for legacy values. C-8/C-9: Added showAssistant?: boolean prop (default true) to ConversationPairCardProps and gated AssistantMessagesSection render with showAssistant && pair.assistantMessages.length > 0. C-4/C-5/C-6/C-7: Added historyUserOnly + onHistoryUserOnlyChange props to HistoryPaneProps; imported lucide-react User/UserCheck; added toggle button with aria-pressed/aria-label/title (rendered only when onHistoryUserOnlyChange supplied); extended searchableMessages useMemo filter to include m.role === 'user' when historyUserOnly is true (with historyUserOnly in deps); skipped orphan pairs in renderContent() and passed showAssistant={!historyUserOnly} to ConversationPairCard. C-2/C-3: Added historyUserOnly state (try/catch localStorage init, safe-off fallback) + handleHistoryUserOnlyChange callback to WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx, propagated to both <HistoryPane> (desktop, line 1523 area) and <MobileContent> calls, plus added the two identifiers to the useMemo dep array on the desktop branch. C-10/C-11: Added the two optional props to MobileContentProps and forwarded them to the inner <HistoryPane> in WorktreeDetailSubComponents.tsx.

refactor.summary: Toggle button uses a distinct active-state background (bg-cyan-900/40 + text-cyan-300) to make the on/off state visually obvious without relying on aria-pressed alone. localStorage write wrapped in try/catch so private-mode browsers cannot break the toggle.

phases.commit: 91cba686 feat(history): add User only filter toggle with localStorage persistence (#725) [案C]

commits: 46c5f510 feat(history): collapse assistant messages to 2 lines / 100 chars (#725) [案A]
c6a81639 feat(history): de-emphasize assistant style + harden user container (#725) [案B]
91cba686 feat(history): add User only filter toggle with localStorage persistence (#725) [案C]

coverage.note: Coverage was not measured in this run because the touched components are UI-only React components fully exercised by the existing + new integration tests (ConversationPairCard.test.tsx 24 tests + HistoryPane.integration.test.tsx 20 tests + conversation-pair-card integration 5 tests). All conditional branches added by this issue (showAssistant gating, historyUserOnly orphan skip, toggle aria-pressed, search role filter, toggle handler invocation) are directly asserted in the 7 new tests.

known_unrelated_issues: tests/integration/trust-dialog-auto-response.test.ts has a pre-existing failure on 'AC5: should timeout if prompt never appears after trust dialog Enter' (unrelated to Issue #725 — verified by running this single test file before any Phase 3 changes were applied; failure persisted).
design_constraints_satisfied: 案C state owned by WorktreeDetailRefactored, props propagated to HistoryPane + MobileContent (matches #168 / #701 pattern).
localStorage value representation 'true' / 'false' matches commandmate:showArchived; safe-off fallback for legacy '1' / '0' covered by strict equality check.
Toggle ARIA uses aria-pressed (matches existing HistoryPane search button); no role=switch+aria-checked mix.
Orphan judgement uses !pair.userMessage (equivalent to pair.status === 'orphan' for current grouping); pair.type was not used because it does not exist on ConversationPair.

Search × User only priority: userOnly hides assistant content (showAssistant=false) regardless of autoExpandedIds; additionally searchableMessages is restricted to user role so no Assistant matches are produced at all when ON.
Icons via lucide-react User / UserCheck (no emojis).
Labels remain English-hardcoded; i18n deferred per issue review summary.
message: TDD実装完了。Phase 1/2/3 すべて Red->Green->Refactor サイクルを完了し、3 コミット (46c5f510, c6a81639, 91cba686) として段階的にコミット。新規テスト 7 件追加、既存 42 件 + 新規 7 件 = 49 件すべて pass。npm run test:unit 全パス (6588 passed)、tsc / ESLint 0 エラー、npm run build 成功。
